message:
✨ Improve back-button UX: scroll restoration, filter history, soft nav

- Add ScrollRestoration component that saves scroll position on
  navigation and restores it on back/forward (popstate)
- Switch filter updates from router.push to router.replace so back
  button returns to the previous page instead of stepping through
  every individual filter change
- Replace window.location.href with router.push in search bar for
  soft navigation that preserves the SPA history stack

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
